metadata.no_auto_align_reason: Standalone TrackCenter completed immediately before this pODMR at 39.367 kcps; use the fresh tracked position directly and avoid hidden target reselection.

metadata.shot_reason: Use 4 x 20000 repetitions to preserve the r01 total shot budget while keeping per-average windows below the 300 s daytime cap after r01 drift flags.
metadata.even_average_reason: Use 4 averages under snake/even-average guidance and r01 drift evidence.
